title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
summary_full: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
summary_public: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
